overridesReasons.react-router: GHSA-84g9-w2xq-vcv6 (low) CSRF via PUT/PATCH/DELETE document requests, fixed >=7.15.1 (covers all other react-router advisories too)
overridesReasons.ws: GHSA-96hv-2xvq-fx4p (high) memory exhaustion DoS from tiny fragments/data chunks, fixed >=8.21.0
overridesReasons.dompurify: GHSA-cmwh-pvxp-8882 + GHSA-rp9w-3fw7-7cwq + GHSA-76mc-f452-cxcm + others (medium/low) ALLOWED_ATTR pollution / IN_PLACE sanitization bypasses, fixed >=3.4.11 (latest 3.4.x; GHSA-x4vx-rjvf-j5p4 has no upstream fix yet but requires IN_PLACE:true usage, which is not present in this codebase)
overridesReasons.vite: GHSA-fx2h-pf6j-xcff (high) server.fs.deny bypass on Windows alt paths + GHSA-v6wh-96g9-6wx3 (medium) launch-editor NTLMv2 hash disclosure, fixed >=6.4.3 (dev-only, stayed within the current 6.x major)
overridesReasons.undici@6: GHSA-58qx-3vcg-4xpx (medium) uninitialized memory disclosure, pulled in transitively by discord.js/@discordjs/rest which pins undici to a 6.x major - kept within major to avoid a breaking API jump for the bot client
overridesReasons.undici@7: GHSA-vxpw-j846-p89q (high) WebSocket DoS + GHSA-hm92-r4w5-c3mj (high) SOCKS5 proxy pool routing + GHSA-p88m-4jfj-68fv (medium) Set-Cookie header injection, pulled in transitively by jsdom (test-only), fixed >=7.28.0
overridesReasons.@babel/core: GHSA-4x5r-pxfx-6jf8 (low) arbitrary source-map file read via sourceMappingURL, fixed >=7.29.6 (stays on the 7.x line; 8.x is a breaking major)
overridesReasons.form-data: GHSA-hmw2-7cc7-3qxx (high) CRLF injection via unescaped multipart field names, pulled in by axios/superagent, fixed >=4.0.6
